---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Background

Explain why this feature is needed and what problem or opportunity it addresses.

## Target Users

Describe who will use this feature, such as admins, warehouse staff, finance users, or other roles.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the system should behave, including key flows, pages, fields, or interactions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Impact

Describe any affected pages, APIs, permissions, data, or deployment configuration.

## References

Add mockups, screenshots, API docs, or reference links if available.
